case_title: CONSTANCE NG VS. PAMELA MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED 11/06/2012 TO CONSTANCE NG.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY NG, CONSTANCE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, PAMELA AAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO PAMELA MARTIN, P.O. BOX 920, SUISUN CITY CA 94585
